ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #1234567890 has been Confirmed
ham.body:
Hello [Customer Name],

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! Your order #1234567890 has been confirmed and is being processed.

**Order Summary**
• Item 1: Wireless Earbuds – ₹1,200
• Item 2: Phone Case – ₹350
• Total: ₹1,550 (incl. GST & shipping)

**Shipping Details**
• Address: 12, Green Lane, Sector‑5, Noida – 201301
• Estimated delivery: 3‑5 working days

If you need to track your shipment, simply log in to your Amazon account or use the tracking number provided in the next email.

Thank you for choosing Amazon. If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or call our support at 1800‑XXX‑XXXX.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Support

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Payment Required to Avoid Delivery Cancellation – FedEx
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that your package with tracking number <TRACKING> was not delivered by FedEx due to a missed delivery notice. To secure your package, you must pay a delivery fee of INR 499 before 24 hours.

Please visit <URL> to verify your account and complete the payment. Failure to pay within the stipulated time will result in cancellation of the shipment and loss of the package.

This is a mandatory step as per FedEx policy and the Indian Customs regulations. Your immediate action is required to avoid any inconvenience.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely,
FedEx Customer Service
